Title: Sustainability Webinar: Proxy Voting Season Preview
Event_Description: Columbia Threadneedle Investments is hosting a webinar focused on emerging trends and key themes for the 2026 proxy voting season in corporate governance and sustainability.

Title: Impact of Natural Hazards on Hazardous Installations (Natech): Understanding vulnerability and managing risks
Event_Description: OECD is hosting an online webinar focused on understanding vulnerability and managing risks of natural hazards affecting hazardous installations, featuring guidance, international perspectives, industry insights, and emerging risk discussions.

Title: Policies for research software in the age of artificial intelligence
Event_Description: OECD, in partnership with EOSC/EVERSE and the Research Software Alliance, is hosting a hybrid workshop focused on policies for research software, exploring governance, infrastructure, skills, standards, public-private partnerships, and international cooperation.

Title: Enhancing regional access - Launch of the Recommendations Report, Action Plan and Implementation Roadmap
Event_Description: OECD is hosting a virtual event focused on launching the Recommendations Report, Action Plan, and Implementation Roadmap for enhancing regional access to EU funds, featuring regional insights, lessons learned, and a Q&A session.

Title: Advancing a Just Green Transition in Cities
Event_Description: OECD is hosting a webinar focused on advancing a just green transition in cities, exploring citizen participation, urban initiatives, and inclusive climate policies to support carbon neutrality and social fairness.

Title: Powering the Future: Driving the Energy Transition in Regions
Event_Description: OECD and European Commission are hosting a webinar focused on regional energy transition strategies, multi-level governance, and transatlantic partnerships to support decarbonisation and industrial renewal.

Title: Leveraging Defence Investments for Regional Development: On the road to the OECD Global Forum on Local Development in Limburg
Event_Description: OECD is hosting an online webinar focused on how rising defence investments can support regional development, industrial capabilities, and local job creation.

Title: The OECD Principles on Rural Policy Series: Rural Proofing Workshop - What is Rural Proofing Intelligence?
Event_Description: OECD's Centre for Entrepreneurship, SMEs, Regions and Cities is hosting a virtual workshop focused on rural proofing intelligence, exploring how evidence and data can inform effective rural policies and improve rural development outcomes.

Title: Transforming Transportation 2026: Powering Jobs and Growth
Event_Description: WRI Ross Center and the World Bank are co-hosting Transforming Transportation 2026, a week-long event focused on the role of transportation in creating jobs, building resilience, and fostering development through discussions, technical sessions, and partner meetings.

Title: 4th Annual Paratransit / Popular Transportation Day at Transforming Transportation 2026
Event_Description: WRI is hosting the 4th Annual Paratransit / Popular Transportation Day at Transforming Transportation 2026, a in-person event focused on sharing knowledge and discussing pathways to improve paratransit services in developing cities.

Title: Scaling Green Infrastructure for a Resilient Rwanda
Event_Description: WRI is hosting an online webinar focused on scaling green infrastructure and nature-based solutions for urban resilience in Rwanda, emphasizing long-term integration into climate and urbanization policies.

Title: Shaping the Global Data Economy: Trade rules, policy space, and development
Event_Description: IISD is hosting a webinar focused on shaping the global data economy through trade rules, policy space, and development, examining cross-border data flows, their impact on economic opportunities, and challenges faced by developing countries.

Title: Industrial Policy and Trade: Key developments to watch
Event_Description: IISD is hosting a webinar focused on current debates in industrial policy and trade, examining key issues, policy trends, and implications for international trade relations ahead of the WTO MC14.
